category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI for adding components to projects; official docs cover shadcn/ui components, registry, and CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shadcn; official documentation refers to the shadcn CLI.
docs_sources: Official shadcn/ui documentation is at ui.shadcn.com/docs and includes a dedicated CLI documentation section.
repo_sources: Official shadcn/ui documentation links to the shadcn-ui/ui GitHub repository; the repository README points back to ui.shadcn.com/docs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a component-adding CLI; official repository topics and docs identify React, Tailwind CSS, UI components, and design-system usage.
